info.title: Cloudflare First Starter API
info.description:
Contract-first API docs generated from shared oRPC contracts.

- REST(OpenAPI-style): `/api/<router>/<procedure>`
- Standard RPC: `/rpc/<router>/<procedure>` (documented separately)
- Auth: `/auth/*` (handled by Better Auth, intentionally separate from `/api/*`)
- Specs:
  - `/openapi/openapi.api.json` (REST)
  - `/openapi/openapi.rpc.json` (Standard RPC wrapper)

post.description: Creates a post. Input is validated and trimmed. Returns the created post (all dates are serialized to ISO strings).

get.description: Returns posts for the authenticated user.
Returns recent async post activity for the authenticated user.
Returns a post by id, including its comments.

get.summary: Get post with category and tags
get.description: Returns a post by id, including optional category and its tags (flattened array).

post.description: Creates a comment for a post. Input is validated and trimmed. Returns the created comment (all dates are serialized to ISO strings).

get.description: Returns comments for a single post.

post.description: Creates a category node. Optionally links to a parent category. Returns the created category (all dates are serialized to ISO strings).

get.description: Returns all categories as a flat list.
Returns categories as a hierarchical tree (roots with recursive children).

post.description: Creates a tag. Tag names are unique; repeated calls for the same name are idempotent and return the existing tag.
